claim: Demand can be raised without raising agent create-task pressure
evidence: Exogenous high raises total created mean from 41.433333 to 78.266667 while agent-created tasks remain near control at 41.433333 to 40.166667
current_decision: Accept the exogenous-arrival holdout as the decisive A2 demand decoupling control
confound: Exogenous arrivals still change task availability and work opportunity
next_falsification_test: Do not run another broad A2 demand sweep unless a concrete artifact bug is found

claim: Load growth is robust under exogenous demand
evidence: High exogenous queue_depth_per_created_task delta is 0.241756 with CI [0.209972, 0.276361] and sign stability 1.0
current_decision: Classify backlog and queued-age effects as load/accounting findings
confound: Queue depth is mechanically tied to arrivals and finite service capacity
next_falsification_test: Use load-normalized queue-flow and service synchronization as primary endpoints in any next-stage preregistration

evidence: High exogenous queue-blind entropy delta is -0.098668 with CI [-0.239733, 0.029129] and sign stability 0.885
current_decision: Classify this as a weak residual point estimate, not a stable lobe-grammar result
confound: Queue-blind labels still depend on action counts and work opportunity
next_falsification_test: Only revisit with a stronger trajectory null or non-action-derived lobe observable

claim: Exogenous demand does not reproduce task-generation locking
evidence: High exogenous queue-blind task-generation dwell-share delta is -0.002778 with CI [-0.036111, 0.030556] and sign stability 0.575
current_decision: Reject the stronger A2 claim that demand alone produces independent task-generation lobe locking
confound: Prior coupled-pressure result changed action mix as well as load
next_falsification_test: Stop broad residual-lobe mechanism sweeps for A2

evidence: High exogenous queue-blind execution dwell-share delta is 0.036111 with CI [0.008333, 0.069445] and sign stability 0.995
current_decision: Treat the execution dwell change as work-opportunity mediated
confound: More queued work makes execution labels more likely without implying independent grammar
next_falsification_test: Report it as an action-budget-mediated trajectory finding

claim: Label-count nulls make baseline lobe claims conservative
evidence: High exogenous baseline entropy observed-minus-null is 0.019209 and dwell-length-max observed-minus-null is -0.020334; strongest dwell observed-minus-null is 0.053 at medium
current_decision: Freeze A2 as load/action-accounting dominated and do not promote baseline lobe dwell as independent emergence
confound: The null is label-count preserving rather than first-order Markov preserving
next_falsification_test: A future analysis-only check may use stronger nulls, but it should not block the A2 conclusion
